meaning: vt.放置,铺设,产(卵)提出,平息,布置vi.下蛋,打赌n.位置,层面,形势,短叙事诗adj.世俗的,外行的 vbl.lie的过去式
examples: He lay there, unable to move.
In the 1970s he managed a potato chip plant for PepsiCos rapidly expanding Frito-Lay division.
Charlene, a lay minister, has been vilified for divorcing a Maine minister to marry Tony in 1992.
